title: Easy Seriously Thick Bleach Easy Cleaner Odour Eliminator Multipurpose Cleaner 750ml X12 | FabFinds Gloves (Mystical Pink)
features: Easy thick bleach with 24 hour germ kill formula to make your home safe, germ free and clean
Made in Britain this seriously thick bleach suitable for use with septic tanks
Kills 99.9% of germs and bacteria; removes tough stains and eliminated tough odours
Multipurpose bleach thick solution that can tackle cleaning duties in your toilets, drains, plugholes, sinks, basins, baths, floor and many more work surfaces
Contents: Seriously Thick Bleach (750mlX12, 1X Fabfinds Gloves)
description: Product description Make your household cleaning a breeze with this Easy Seriously Thick Bleach Original 750ml. Featuring a 24-hour germ kill design, this thick bleach will protect your surfaces from bacteria and germs. Great for cleaning toilets, this thick bleach gel will remove tough stains and destroy odours. Transform your cleaning routine with Easy Seriously Thick Bleach! This powerful formula removes even the toughest stains and eliminates unpleasant odours, leaving your toilet looking and smelling fresh. With a refreshing lavender scent and the ability to kill 99.9% of bacteria. Experience the power of Easy Seriously Thick Bleach Pine! Specially formulated with 24hr germ kill, it effortlessly eliminates tough stains and germs around the home. With just one product, you can keep your home clean and safe for your loved ones. Trust Easy Seriously Thick Bleach Pine for a sparkling and germ-free environment. Keep your toilet and home looking sparkling clean with this Easy Seriously Thick Bleach Citrus 750ml. Designed to remove stains and destroy odours, this thick bleach comes in a bright citrus colour with a refreshing scent. Safe to use on septic tanks, this bleach comes with an angle neck bottle so you can clean hard to reach areas. Ensure your toilet and home is always kept sparkling clean with this Easy Seriously Thick Bleach Pink 750ml. Removing all tough stains and destroying odour, this bleach comes in a bright pink colourway, safe to use with septic tanks. Ingredients 5% anionic surfactant, 5% chlorine based bleaching agent, sodium hypochlorite Directions To remove cap: squeeze at grips and unscrew anti-clockwise. To replace cap:screw on tightly clockwise until a click is heard. In the toilet squirt product around the toilet seat in the upright position while bleaching the toilet. Sinks, basins, work surfaces, baths, floors: use a solution of 250ml of bleach to 5 litres of water. Leave on for at least 5 minutes. Rinse after use. Safety Warning Easy seriously thick bleach contains sodium hypochlorite and sodium hydroxide. Causes severe skin burns an eye damage. Toxic to aquatic life with long lasting effects. Warning, do not use together with other products. Keep out of reach of children. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. Wash hands and exposed skin thouroughly after handling. Avoid release to environment. If swalled: rinse mouth. do not induce vomiting. If on skin(or hair): take off immediately all water for several minutes. remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. Immediately call poison center or doctor See more
